title: Prepare and apply chemicals for hand held application equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and apply chemicals for hand held application equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine the need for chemical use and prepare basic application plan

pcs.text: Identify the characteristics of the pest, weed or disease and assess the control requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the characteristics of the pest, weed or disease and assess the control requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the characteristics of the pest, weed or disease and assess the control requirements.

pcs.text: Assess and select a chemical control option according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and select a chemical control option according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and select a chemical control option according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and controls for selected chemical
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and controls for selected chemical?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and controls for selected chemical.

pcs.text: Determine the requirement for chemical usage according to chemical label instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the requirement for chemical usage according to chemical label instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the requirement for chemical usage according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Prepare a basic application plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a basic application plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a basic application plan according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Notify stakeholders of intended chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify stakeholders of intended chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify stakeholders of intended chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine the need for chemical use and prepare basic application plan

elements.title: Prepare chemical mixes

pcs.text: Access the application plan and determine chemical application parameters according to chemical label instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access the application plan and determine chemical application parameters according to chemical label instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access the application plan and determine chemical application parameters according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for application method according to chemical label and health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for application method according to chemical label and health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for application method according to chemical label and health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Interpret and apply requirements from chemical labels and safety data sheets (SDS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and apply requirements from chemical labels and safety data sheets (SDS)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and apply requirements from chemical labels and safety data sheets (SDS).

pcs.text: Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to chemical label and workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to chemical label and workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to chemical label and workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select appropriate mixing equipment and a suitable location for mixing and loading according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate mixing equipment and a suitable location for mixing and loading according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate mixing equipment and a suitable location for mixing and loading according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare chemicals according to chemical label instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare chemicals according to chemical label instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare chemicals according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Clean preparation equipment and work site of residues and spillage according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean preparation equipment and work site of residues and spillage according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean preparation equipment and work site of residues and spillage according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare chemical mixes

elements.title: Calibrate application equipment

pcs.text: Select application equipment to be used to minimise off target risk and maximise efficacy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select application equipment to be used to minimise off target risk and maximise efficacy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select application equipment to be used to minimise off target risk and maximise efficacy.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational checks of application equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational checks of application equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational checks of application equipment.

pcs.text: Calibrate equipment in accordance with manufacturers’ specifications and application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate equipment in accordance with manufacturers’ specifications and application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate equipment in accordance with manufacturers’ specifications and application plan.

pcs.text: Load the equipment with chemical according to operating instructions and workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load the equipment with chemical according to operating instructions and workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load the equipment with chemical according to operating instructions and workplace safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Calibrate application equipment

elements.title: Apply chemicals

pcs.text: Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective chemical application according to application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective chemical application according to application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective chemical application according to application plan.

pcs.text: Identify, select, fit and use PPE according to chemical label instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select, fit and use PPE according to chemical label instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select, fit and use PPE according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Apply chemical while minimising off target damage according to label directions, SDS and application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply chemical while minimising off target damage according to label directions, SDS and application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply chemical while minimising off target damage according to label directions, SDS and application plan.

pcs.text: Assess health and safety hazards and risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess health and safety hazards and risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess health and safety hazards and risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean up chemical spills according to workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean up chemical spills according to workplace and manufacturer procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean up chemical spills according to workplace and manufacturer procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Apply chemicals

elements.title: Clean up equipment and complete records

pcs.text: Clean and decontaminate application equipment according to operator instructions, SDS and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and decontaminate application equipment according to operator instructions, SDS and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and decontaminate application equipment according to operator instructions, SDS and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of chemicals and used containers according to manufacturer instructions and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of chemicals and used containers according to manufacturer instructions and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of chemicals and used containers according to manufacturer instructions and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Clean and store PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete chemical treatment records and report incidents according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete chemical treatment records and report incidents according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete chemical treatment records and report incidents according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Clean up equipment and complete records

indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
